subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the beauty of the Lord, the All-Merciful! If through the grace and bounty of the Ancient Beauty thou shouldst attain unto His pure-hearted loved ones in ecstasy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آشفته جمال رب رحمن اگر بفضل و عنایت جمال قدم باحبای خالصش پی پری از وجد و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
